---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-27"
---



```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
library(patchwork)
library(ggvenn)
library(randomForest)
library(forcats)
library(RColorBrewer)

```

####Venn
```{r}
merged_all = readRDS("/mnt/beegfs/labs/DiGenomaLab/rfhap/analysis/classification_comparison/random_forest/train-v03/intersection_methods.rds")
```

```{r cars}
df = merged_all
df
```
##Venn test
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggforce)

# vectores de etiquetas (ya en tu entorno)
A <- as.character(df$trio_binning)
B <- as.character(df$hifiasm)
C <- as.character(df$rfhap)

n <- length(A)

# regiones mutuamente excluyentes CORRECTAS
ABC      <- sum(A == B & B == C)                          # los tres iguales
AB_only  <- sum(A == B & A != C)                          # A y B iguales, C distinto
AC_only  <- sum(A == C & A != B)                          # A y C iguales, B distinto
BC_only  <- sum(B == C & B != A)                          # B y C iguales, A distinto
all_diff <- sum(A != B & A != C & B != C)                 # las tres diferentes

# sanity check
sum_regions <- ABC + AB_only + AC_only + BC_only + all_diff
stopifnot(sum_regions == n)   # esto debe pasar

res <- data.frame(
  categoria = c("los_tres_coinciden", "trio_binning_hifiasm", "trio_binning_no_norm_trainv03",
                "hifiasm_no_norm_trainv03", "ninguna_coincide"),
  count = c(ABC, AB_only, AC_only, BC_only, all_diff),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
res$percent <- 100 * res$count / n
res$percent <- round(res$percent, 2)

print(res)
cat("Suma porcentajes:", sum(res$percent), "\n")  # ~100 (puede haber redondeo)

# Para graficar (ejemplo esquemático con ggforce):
# posiciones de etiquetas - ajusta si hace falta
```

```{r}

labels_pos <- data.frame(
  categoria = c(
    "trio_binning_hifiasm",         # AB_only
    "trio_binning_no_norm_trainv03",# AC_only
    "hifiasm_no_norm_trainv03",     # BC_only
    "los_tres_coinciden",           # ABC
    "ninguna_coincide"              # all_diff
  ),
  x = c(
    0.60,   # AB_only
    0.10,   # AC_only (más al centro y arriba)
    1.2,   # BC_only (más al centro y arriba)
    0.60,   # ABC
    1.90    # all_diff
  ),
  y = c(
    -0.25,  # AB_only
    0.85,   # AC_only → centrado mejor
    0.85,   # BC_only → centrado mejor
    0.40,   # ABC
    1.60    # all_diff
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

label_df <- merge(labels_pos, res, by = "categoria", all.x = TRUE)
label_df$label <- paste0(label_df$count, "\n", label_df$percent, "%")

# -------------------------------------------------------------
# CÍRCULOS
# -------------------------------------------------------------
circles <- data.frame(
  name = c("trio_binning", "hifiasm", "rfhap"),
  x0 = c(0.0, 1.2, 0.6),
  y0 = c(0.0, 0.0, 1.05),
  r  = c(1.05, 1.05, 1.05)
)

# -------------------------------------------------------------
# TÍTULOS DE LOS CÍRCULOS 
# -------------------------------------------------------------
circle_labels <- transform(
  circles,
  lab_x = x0,
  lab_y = ifelse(name == "rfhap", y0 + r + 0.15, y0 - r - 0.15)
)


palette_paper <- c(
  "trio_binning" = "#66C2A5",  # azul medio
  "hifiasm"      = "steelblue2",  # azul claro–medio
  "rfhap"        = "lightsalmon"   # naranjo medio
)

# -------------------------------------------------------------
# GRÁFICO FINAL
# -------------------------------------------------------------
p <- ggplot() +
  geom_circle(data = circles,
              aes(x0 = x0, y0 = y0, r = r, fill = name),
              color = "black", alpha = 0.35, size = 0.4) +

  # etiquetas de intersecciones
  geom_text(data = label_df,
            aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
            size = 7, lineheight = 0.9) +

  # títulos de los círculos
  geom_text(data = circle_labels,
            aes(x = lab_x, y = lab_y, label = name),
            size = 9) +

  coord_fixed(xlim = c(-1.2, 2.3), ylim = c(-1.2, 2.2)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(text=element_text(size=27), plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,size = 30, face = "bold"), legend.position = "none")+
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_paper)
 # scale_fill_manual(values = c(
  #  "trio_binning" = "#F8766D",
   # "hifiasm"      = "#00BA38",
    #"rfhap"        = "#619CFF"
  #))

print(p)
```


##Importance
```{r}
rf_model=readRDS("/mnt/beegfs/labs/DiGenomaLab/rfhap/processing/rfhap/results/HG002/HG002_dataset/rf/train/HG002_standar_ont_sup_PAW70337.fastq_fastkm_matrix_rf_model.rds")

```

```{r}

varimplot=varImpPlot(rf_model,main="Importance of features")
varimplot=as.data.frame(varimplot)
varimplot$feature=row.names(varimplot)
```

```{r}

set2_col <- "steelblue"

plot_importance <- varimplot %>%
  filter(MeanDecreaseGini > 500) %>%
  mutate(feature = fct_reorder(feature, MeanDecreaseGini)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = MeanDecreaseGini,
    y = feature,
    size = MeanDecreaseGini        
  )) +
    geom_point(
    shape  = 21,              
    fill   = "steelblue",     
    color  = "steelblue4",    
    stroke = 1.2,            
    alpha  = 0.6
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(
    range = c(3, 10),              
    guide = "none"                 
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "MeanDecreaseGini",
    y = "Feature"
  ) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 27),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"), axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black")
  )

png("importance.png", width = 1000 , height = 800)
plot_importance
dev.off()
plot_importance
```

###Prediction
```{r}
library(data.table)
prob = read.table("/mnt/beegfs/labs/DiGenomaLab/rfhap/processing/rfhap/results/HG002/HG002_dataset/rf/prediction/HG002_standar_ont_sup_PAW71238.fastq_fastkm_matrix.2_rf_prediction.txt", sep =" ", header =TRUE)

table(prob$Predicted.Class)

```

```{r}
fill_colors <- c(
  "A" = alpha("#66C2A5", 0.25),    
  "B" = alpha("steelblue2", 0.25),
  "U" = alpha("lightsalmon", 0.25)
)

border_colors <- c(
  "A" = "#66C2A5",     # verde más oscuro
  "B" = "steelblue", # azul más oscuro
  "U" = "lightsalmon"     # naranjo más oscuro
)
```

```{r}
prob_plot <- ggplot(
  prob,
  aes(
    x = Predicted.prob.A,
    y = Predicted.prob.B,
    fill  = Predicted.Class,  
    color = Predicted.Class
  )
) +
  geom_point(
    shape  = 21,
    size   = 3,
    stroke = 0.6               
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "A",
    y = "B",
    fill  = "Predicted Class",
    color = "Predicted Class"
  ) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = border_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
    theme(
    text = element_text(size = 27),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1, color = "black"), axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )


prob_plot

```

```{r}
library(patchwork)
png("super_figure.png", width = 3000, height = 1700 , res = 130)
(plot_importance | p | prob_plot) +
  plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = "A",
    theme = theme(
      plot.tag = element_text(
        size = 32,
        face = "bold"   
      )
    )
  )
dev.off()
```
